modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to print to connected printers on Windows 10.

full_description_text:  
I am having a really frustrating issue where I cannot print to two out of my three printers. The print settings that I need do not show up at all, and I keep getting this annoying message that says, "Windows cannot access the specified device, path or file." It also mentions something about permissions, which I don't really understand. When I try to look for my printer, it is just not listed anywhere, and I am completely unable to print anything at this time. I even got a message saying, "Unable to connect to the printer. Make sure your printer is properly connected and powered on," but I have checked everything and it seems fine.
short_description: Unable to print to connected printers on Windows 10.
